title: rubus supervestitus
intro: Rubus supervestitus, also known as the Yellow Raspberry, is a type of bramble that belongs to the rose family and is native to eastern North America. Its leaves and stems have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The Yellow Raspberry is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, due to its high content of antioxidants and vitamins. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
